title: Wynncraft Big Items
description: Increase the size of dropped items when favorited from the Wynntils item guide
body:
# Wynncraft Big Items

- Increase the size of individual favorited items from your Wynntils content book
- Hide Emeralds dropped on the ground

Hotkeys to toggle features can be set in Minecraft keybind settings

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ba072f57b5ce698d85574cffa4ddc99a6db002_0.webp)
